title: Bare Bones x Lemoned (Farmer's Delight)
description: Lemoned, but in the style of the trailers
body:
# ENG
The resource pack makes the textures from the [Lemoned](https://modrinth.com/mod/lemoned-(farmers-delight)) mod into textures similar to those in the trailer update of Minecraft.

It is recommended to download two more resource packs: [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) and [Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-farmers-delight) for more immersion.

## Mod from the author: [Tejty](https://modrinth.com/user/Tejty)

**P.S:** Shader in the banner: [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

# RUS
Ресурс пак делает текстуры из мода [Lemoned](https://modrinth.com/mod/lemoned-(farmers-delight)) в текстуры похожие как в трейлере обновлении Майнкрафта.

Рекомендуется скачать ещё два ресурс пака: [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) и [Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-farmers-delight), чтобы было больше погружении.

## Мод от автора: [Tejty](https://modrinth.com/user/Tejty)

**P.S:** Шейдер в баннере: [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)  

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9823994e2f34375236661ecdb41beaf6a1fb080.png)
